mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product_sku WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM product_sku WHERE deleted = 0 AND id IN #{id}
SELECT * FROM product_sku WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE product_sku SET stock = stock - #{quantity}, sales = sales + #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{skuId} AND stock >= #{quantity} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE product_sku SET stock = stock + #{quantity}, sales = GREATEST(sales - #{quantity}, 0), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{skuId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_sku(product_id, spec_name, price_fen, stock, sales, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{productId}, #{specName}, #{priceFen}, #{stock}, 0, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE product_sku SET spec_name = #{specName}, price_fen = #{priceFen}, stock = #{stock}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
